title: gonolobus stipitatus
intro: Gonolobus stipitatus, also known as the yellow gourd vine, is a plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Gonolobus stipitatus include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil for its herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
